title: Add option to automatically start with windows in Tools > Options dialog
author: icnocop
body_snippet:
Hi.

I'd like to request the ability to configure mRemoteNG to automatically start with Windows from within it's Options dialog.

As a work-around, I have to manually create a shortcut in my Startup folder.

Thank you!

iterations.description: Clear feature request to add a 'Start with Windows' toggle in Tools > Options, which is a standard UX enhancement for desktop applications

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:

notes:
AI triage: Clear feature request to add a 'Start with Windows' toggle in Tools > Options, which is a standard UX enhancement for desktop applications
Approach: Add a checkbox to the Startup/Exit options page that creates/removes a registry entry in HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run pointing to the mRemoteNG executable
